title: satureja buchii
intro: Satureja buchii, also known as Mexican oregano or mountain marjoram, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Satureja buchii include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Satureja buchii can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or infused in water, and is also used as a culinary herb in various Mexican and South American dishes.
